# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- type: compute.v1.instance
  name: vm-instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - name: External NAT
        type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

- type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  name: sql-instance
  properties:
    region: us-central
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-1
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true

- type: storage.v1.bucket
  name: my_bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    versioning:
      enabled: true

- type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  name: http-rule
  properties:
    IPAddress: $(ref.ip.address)
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.target-http-proxy.selfLink)

- type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  name: http-health-check
  properties:
    requestPath: /

- type: compute.v1.backendService
  name: http-backend-service
  properties:
    portName: http
    protocol: HTTP
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.http-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.instance-group.selfLink)

- type: compute.v1.urlMap
  name: web-map
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.http-backend-service.selfLink)

- type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  name: target-http-proxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.web-map.selfLink)

- type: compute.v1.address
  name: ip
  properties:
    region: us-central1

- type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
  name: instance-group
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: 80
